expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: donut-chart data label coverage distinguishes label visibility, density, and overlap-sensitive outcomes
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Case focus coverage…”, the output explicitly enumerates the required distinctions: “Label visibility”, “High density”, and “Overlap-sensitive behavior (collision handling, truncation, hiding, repositioning)”, and marks it “PASS (advisory, contract capability)”.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Phase alignment check (primary: Phase 4a)”, it states “PASS (contract-level)” and cites Phase 4a contract requirements: “subcategory-only QA draft… atomic action chains / observable verification leaves”, while noting artifact-level verification isn’t possible due to missing phase4a outputs.
